expectations.text: Gate B fired: asked for the actual page (paste copy / URL / screenshot) plus goal and audience BEFORE auditing
expectations.evidence: The response asks for the page copy, what action visitors should take, and where the traffic comes from before conducting any audit.

expectations.text: Did NOT invent the page's contents and audit its own invention
expectations.evidence: No page content is invented — the response only asks questions and promises a specific, prioritized fix list once the content is shared.

expectations.text: May offer a clearly-labeled generic checklist as a fallback
expectations.evidence: The response states 'I can give you a general checklist to self-audit against in the meantime' as a clearly labeled fallback option.
